channel.title: Gheware DevOps AI Blog
channel.description: Kubernetes tutorials, Docker guides, CI/CD best practices, AI agent engineering, and cloud-native insights for DevOps engineers.

item.title: AI Agent Evaluation & Benchmarking: The Enterprise Framework for 2026
item.description: Stop guessing which AI agent performs best. This enterprise evaluation framework covers 7 benchmark dimensions, MMLU + GAIA scores, cost-per-task metrics, and real production tests CTOs use to make build vs buy decisions in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: KAITO: Kubernetes AI Toolchain Operator — The Enterprise Guide to Deploying LLM AI Models in 2026
item.description: Discover how KAITO (Kubernetes AI Toolchain Operator) enables enterprise teams to deploy, scale, and manage production LLM AI workloads on Kubernetes. Complete implementation guide with architecture patterns, YAML examples, and real-world use cases for 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Build Your Enterprise AI Control Plane
item.description: Deploying AI agents without a control plane invites runaway costs, security breaches, and compliance failures. Learn the production architecture.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: [POST_TITLE]
item.description: [POST_DESCRIPTION - 150-160 chars for optimal display]
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: OpenTelemetry for AI Agents: Production Observability Guide 2026
item.description: Instrument AI agents with OpenTelemetry in production. LLM span tracing, multi-agent workflows, and Grafana Tempo setup for enterprise DevOps teams.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Enterprise Agentic AI Playbook 2026
item.description: Step-by-step playbook: How JPMorgan, Oracle, Goldman Sachs deploy AI agent swarms on Kubernetes. Covers MCP security, multi-agent orchestration, and ROI measurement.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Kubernetes for GenAI: Production Architecture Patterns 2026
item.description: Production Kubernetes architectures for GenAI workloads. GPU scheduling, KServe inference serving, KEDA autoscaling, and security patterns from enterprise deployments.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Self-Healing DevOps Pipelines: How AI Agents Are Replacing Your On-Call Engineers (2026)
item.description: Your CI/CD pipeline just fixed itself before you noticed it broke. Here's how AI-powered self-healing DevOps works — with working code for autonomous incident response, AI-driven root cause analysis, and proactive pipeline recovery.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration on Kubernetes: Production Patterns for 2026
item.description: Enterprise guide to orchestrating multi-agent AI systems on Kubernetes. Production patterns, deployment strategies, security, and observability for 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangGraph StateGraph: Beginner's Guide to AI Agent Workflows 2026
item.description: LangGraph StateGraph is the foundation of every production AI agent. Learn nodes, edges, state management, and conditional routing from first principles — with complete runnable Python examples.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Build vs Buy AI Agents: The Enterprise Decision Framework 2026
item.description: Should your enterprise build AI agents with LangGraph or buy a vendor solution? The 5-factor decision framework used by Fortune 500 teams to make the right call — with total cost of ownership analysis.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangChain Expression Language (LCEL) Complete Guide 2026
item.description: LCEL is the composable interface that makes LangChain production-ready. Learn pipe syntax, parallel chains, streaming, fallbacks, and the patterns that separate toy demos from real AI agents.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Ollama Local LLM Development Guide 2026: Run AI Agents Without the Cloud
item.description: Ollama lets you run Llama 3, Mistral, and Phi-3 locally with zero API cost. Complete guide to model selection, LangChain integration, multi-model switching, and production-quality local LLM development patterns.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Prompt Injection Attacks on AI Agents: Threats, Patterns, and Defences
item.description: Prompt injection is the #1 security risk for AI agents in production. Learn direct injection, indirect injection via tool outputs, and the 4 defence layers every enterprise AI agent needs.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: FastAPI for AI Agents: Production Deployment Patterns That Scale
item.description: FastAPI is the standard for deploying AI agents as production APIs. Learn async endpoints, streaming responses, background tasks, health checks, and Docker deployment patterns with complete code examples.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Embeddings Explained: The Math-Free Guide Every AI Engineer Needs
item.description: Embeddings are the foundation of RAG, semantic search, and agent memory. Learn what they are, how to choose embedding models, and how to avoid the top 3 production mistakes.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangFuse in Production: Tracing, Evaluation, and Cost Tracking for AI Agents
item.description: LangFuse is the open-source observability layer every production AI agent needs. Step-by-step guide to tracing LangChain agents, setting up evals, and tracking LLM costs per workflow.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: The Supervisor Pattern: How to Orchestrate Multi-Agent Teams with LangGraph
item.description: The supervisor pattern is the production standard for multi-agent AI systems. Learn how one orchestrator agent routes work to specialist agents — with real LangGraph code and failure modes.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Human-in-the-Loop AI: 4 LangGraph Patterns That Keep Humans in Control
item.description: Fully autonomous AI agents fail on edge cases. Learn the 4 human-in-the-loop patterns in LangGraph — approval gates, interrupt-and-resume, confidence thresholds, and escalation chains.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Guardrails for AI Agents: How to Stop Your LLM from Going Rogue in Production
item.description: Without guardrails, AI agents hallucinate, leak data, and take catastrophic actions. Learn how to implement input/output validation, NeMo Guardrails, and constitutional AI constraints.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: OWASP LLM Top 10: The Security Checklist Every AI Engineer Needs in 2026
item.description: The OWASP LLM Top 10 lists the exact vulnerabilities attacking production AI systems in 2026. Here's what each risk means, real exploit patterns, and how to defend against them.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Beyond AI Copilot: How AI SRE Agents Are Replacing the On-Call Engineer in 2026
item.description: AI SRE agents built on Kagent and LangChain are now autonomously handling 2 AM incidents. Learn the architecture, real failure modes, and how to deploy AI on-call engineers safely in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI Agent Governance in the Enterprise: Audit Trails, LLM Guardrails & Compliance for 2026
item.description: The EU AI Act applies from August 2026. Learn how enterprise teams govern AI agents with audit trails, LLM guardrails, NIST AI RMF alignment, and kill switches. Practical framework from 25 years in financial services.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: FinOps for AI Agents on Kubernetes: The Enterprise Cost Optimization Playbook 2026
item.description: Enterprise guide to FinOps for AI agents on Kubernetes. GPU rightsizing, spot instances, serverless GPUs, and FinOps culture for agentic AI workloads in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Agent Sprawl Is the New Cloud Sprawl: How to Build an Agentic Command Center in 2026
item.description: Learn how enterprise teams are solving agent sprawl with Agentic Command Centers. Practical architecture patterns, governance frameworks, and orchestration strategies from 25+ years of enterprise experience.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Production-Ready AI Agents: Closing the Enterprise Deployment Gap 2026
item.description: Why 89% of AI agent projects fail to reach production. Learn the 11% success path: governance, data quality, integration patterns, and organizational change management for enterprise teams.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Agentic AI Implementation Roadmap: A 90-Day Plan for Enterprise Teams in 2026
item.description: A proven 90-day roadmap for enterprise teams adopting agentic AI in 2026. From pilot to production: architecture decisions, team structure, tooling, governance, and KPIs that actually matter.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Kubernetes for GenAI Workloads: Enterprise Architecture Guide 2026 (KubeCon EU)
item.description: KubeCon EU 2026 confirmed: 66% of GenAI workloads run on Kubernetes. Learn how to architect enterprise GenAI apps with llm-d, DRA, Volcano v1.14, and NVIDIA Grove — from a CKA architect with 25+ years at JPMorgan.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Google A2A Protocol Explained: Enterprise Multi-Agent AI Systems in 2026
item.description: Google A2A protocol enables AI agents to communicate across enterprise boundaries. Learn how to build multi-agent systems with A2A + MCP, real architecture patterns, and Kubernetes deployment in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Kubernetes Cost Optimization with AI Agents: Enterprise Playbook to Cut Cloud Spend 40% in 2026
item.description: Learn how AI agents automate Kubernetes cost optimization in 2026. Real patterns from enterprise deployments: right-sizing, idle resource elimination, and FinOps automation that cuts cloud spend by 40%.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Vibe Coding for Enterprise DevOps: A Practical Guide to AI-First Development in 2026
item.description: Vibe coding is transforming enterprise DevOps in 2026. Learn how teams at JPMorgan, Oracle, and Deloitte are using AI-first development to ship 3x faster — and how to govern it safely at scale.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LangGraph State Machines for Production: How Enterprise Teams Scale Multi-Agent AI Beyond Prototypes
item.description: Learn how to build production-grade LangGraph state machines that scale. Covers checkpointing, interrupt-and-resume, parallel subgraphs, and enterprise deployment patterns on Kubernetes — from an architect who trains Fortune 500 teams.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: GPU-Optimized Kubernetes for LLM Inference 2026: Enterprise Setup in 5 Steps
item.description: Serving LLMs on Kubernetes? The exact GPU scheduling, model quantization & node pool setup used at JPMorgan Chase — cuts inference costs 60%, latency 40%. Enterprise architect's 5-step playbook + free checklist →
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: The MCP Context Window Crisis: Why Enterprise AI Agents Are Hitting a Hidden Token Wall
item.description: 3 MCP servers can consume 143k of your 200k context window before your AI agent does any real work. Learn the CLI-first design patterns that fix this in enterprise production environments.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: From DevOps to AgentOps: The Enterprise Guide to Managing AI Agent Fleets in Production (2026)
item.description: AgentOps is the next evolution of DevOps. Learn how enterprise teams manage AI agent fleets in 2026 — NVIDIA Vera, CLI-first architecture, MCP context limits, and the 5-layer production platform.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI-Powered GitOps: How AI Agents Are Transforming Kubernetes Deployment Automation in 2026
item.description: Traditional GitOps is static. AI-powered GitOps thinks. Learn how AI agents integrated with ArgoCD and Flux are enabling autonomous drift remediation, predictive rollbacks, and self-healing pipelines in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Why Enterprise DevOps Teams Are Standardizing on MCP Over CLIs in 2026
item.description: While developers debate MCP vs CLI, enterprises are quietly standardizing on Model Context Protocol. Learn why MCP wins for enterprise AI agents: auth, telemetry, governance, and how to migrate your team.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AIOps on Kubernetes: Why Your Observability Stack Is Blind Without AI (2026 Guide)
item.description: Prometheus and Grafana can't catch what they can't model. Learn how AIOps on Kubernetes — AI anomaly detection, autonomous incident response, and unified telemetry — closes the observability gap in 2026. With working code.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Platform Engineering with AI Agents: Building Your AI-Powered IDP in 2026
item.description: Discover how platform engineering teams are embedding AI agents into Internal Developer Platforms in 2026. Architecture patterns, Backstage AI plugins, self-healing golden paths, and a 90-day IDP modernisation roadmap.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: LLM Quantization on Kubernetes: Run Production AI Inference Without Buying New Hardware in 2026
item.description: Your existing Kubernetes cluster can run quantized LLMs in production today. Learn INT4/INT8 quantization, vLLM on K8s, and GitOps deployment patterns that cut GPU costs 60–80% in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: AI DevOps Governance: The 5-Checkpoint Framework Every Enterprise Needs in 2026
item.description: Amazon's Kiro AI caused a 13-hour production outage. Learn the 5-checkpoint AI DevOps governance framework that prevents disasters while keeping your pipeline fast in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: From DevOps to AgentOps: Why Enterprise Engineering Teams Need a New Playbook in 2026
item.description: 74% of enterprises plan autonomous AI agent deployment within 2 years. Learn how DevOps teams must evolve to AgentOps—new tooling, new roles, new pipelines—with practical guidance from 25+ years in enterprise engineering.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Agentic AI vs RPA: The Enterprise ROI Comparison Every CTO Needs in 2026
item.description: Agentic AI vs RPA ROI compared for 2026 enterprise automation. Which delivers faster payback? Real cost data from Fortune 500 deployments.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Enterprise Agentic AI Deployment 2026: The Complete Infrastructure Guide
item.description: Enterprise agentic AI deployment 2026 guide: infrastructure stack, Kubernetes configs, governance, security, observability, and phased rollout strategy from 25 years of enterprise experience.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: How Fortune 500 Companies Deploy Agentic AI Teams in 2026: Real Playbook
item.description: 73% of Fortune 500 CIOs are deploying agentic AI teams in 2026. Here's the exact playbook—architecture, governance, and rollout phases—used by enterprise leaders.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: How to Train Enterprise Teams on Agentic AI: The Complete L&D Playbook 2026
item.description: 74% of enterprises cite workforce skill gaps as their #1 barrier to AI deployment. This step-by-step L&D playbook trains your teams on agentic AI—fast.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: Langfuse vs LangSmith vs Arize: Which LLM Observability Tool for Enterprise?
item.description: Compare Langfuse, LangSmith, and Arize Phoenix for enterprise LLM observability in 2026. Pricing, features, Kubernetes integration, and the right choice for your AI platform team.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)

item.title: The GenAI Red Team Revolution: How AI Agents Are Replacing Human Security Researchers in 2026
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 found 22 Firefox zero-days in 2 weeks. AI red teaming is here. Learn how to implement GenAI security agents on Kubernetes with SPIFFE, OPA, Trivy, and LangGraph in 2026.
item.author: rajesh@gheware.com (Rajesh Gheware)
